methods.name: open
methods.description: Navigates to the Swag Labs login page

methods.name: getErrorMessage
methods.description: Returns the text of the login error message

methods.name: isLoaded
methods.description: Returns true if inventory page is loaded

methods.name: isBackpackVisible
methods.description: Returns true if the Sauce Labs Backpack is visible

methods.name: addBackpackToCart
methods.description: Clicks the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack

methods.name: getCartCount
methods.description: Returns the number shown on the shopping cart badge
